final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a 3:4 vertical nine-grid poster suitable for Xiaohongshu (RedNote), laid out in a 3-column × 3-row grid. Each of the 9 cells must have clearly visible borders or gutters so the full image can be cleanly sliced into 9 individual square cards after export. Overall aesthetic: clean, refined, unified — targeting female wellness lifestyle content with a Xiaohongshu viral-cover quality. Layout is information-clear, large readable Chinese text, comfortable whitespace, gentle and healing color palette.

Style/medium: ins-style flat illustration with light skeuomorphic decorative elements; magazine-grade editorial layout; healing / sleep-therapy theme; clean minimalist typography
Composition: strict 3-column × 3-row nine-grid; each cell self-contained and centered; visible cell gutters or thin borders; no text or key elements placed near cut lines; all 9 cells share unified visual language
Subject: nine-grid sleep-tips knowledge poster — 9 individual card-style cells, each a complete Xiaohongshu-style graphic card
Scene/backdrop: overall background in creamy white / light beige / oat / light caramel tones; each cell has its own soft warm background variation within the same palette
Lighting/mood: soft warm ambient light; healing, calm, cozy bedtime atmosphere; no harsh shadows
Color palette: cream white, light beige, oat, light caramel as dominant tones; small accents of deep brown for body text; warm and gentle throughout
Materials/textures: soft flat illustration style with subtle light skeuomorphic touches; pillow, moon, stars, warm milk, aromatherapy candle, book, sleep mask, curtain, bed linen as decorative elements
Text (verbatim): 
Cell 1 (cover) — large headline: 让你倒头就睡的8个 tips｜subtitle: 失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏｜visual: soft bed, moon, pillow, sleep mask
Cell 2 — title: 1. 睡前1小时别玩手机｜body: 蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。｜elements: phone, moon, sleepy face illustration
Cell 3 — title: 2. 睡前把灯光调暗｜body: 暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。｜elements: bedside lamp, warm yellow light, curtain
Cell 4 — title: 3. 房间温度别太高｜body: 稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。｜elements: air conditioner, thermometer, blanket
Cell 5 — title: 4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡｜body: 咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。｜elements: coffee cup, tea cup, no symbol
Cell 6 — title: 5. 睡前洗个热水澡｜body: 能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。｜elements: bathroom steam, towel, hot water
Cell 7 — title: 6. 脑子停不下来就写下来｜body: 把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。｜elements: notebook, pen, small desk lamp
Cell 8 — title: 7. 固定上床时间｜body: 每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。｜elements: clock, moon, bed
Cell 9 — title: 8. 试试深呼吸放松法｜body: 吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。｜footer small text: 收藏这组，今晚试试看｜elements: breath wave lines, closed-eyes figure, stars
Constraints: all text must be Chinese only, no English, no garbled characters; every cell must be fully readable after slicing; no text or illustration overlapping the grid cut lines; unified font style across all 9 cells — neat, structured, legible
Avoid: cheap marketing feel, overly busy decoration, English text, garbled text, low-end graphic design aesthetic, text placed on or across cell borders
